pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Prebuilt binary distribution of amazon-efs-utils. Fetches the official x86_64 RPM from amazon-efs-utils.aws.com (built by AWS for Amazon Linux 2023) and repackages it for Gentoo.
This exists because the source build requires GCC 13 or earlier (the AWS-LC FIPS module's assembler delocator fails on GCC 14+) and Gentoo's rolling release typically ships a newer GCC. The binary RPM is statically linked against AL2023's toolchain, sidestepping the build-system incompatibility.
Users who need a source build should install net-fs/amazon-efs-utils instead and provide GCC 13 via BDEPEND or a CC override.
